content:
- Ralph task_switch completed and updated current_tasks/current_tasks_done/task_history; the active task pointer was cleared as expected
- remaining worktree changes are only the smell task metadata plus Ralph bookkeeping/progress files, ready to commit together
- next: git add -A, create the required task-finished commit with check/test evidence, push to origin, and stop

- after the first push, only Ralph summary timestamp drift remained in current_tasks.md and current_tasks_done.md
- choosing a small follow-up commit instead of amend so the branch ends clean while keeping the required task-finished commit intact
- next: commit the final Ralph summary refresh, push again, verify git status is clean, then stop

- started choose-task pass
- read previous progress log and loaded list-active-tasks skill instructions
- next: refresh Ralph summaries and inspect current_tasks/current_tasks_done plus choose-task rules before selecting the next task path

- refreshed Ralph summaries and read current_tasks/current_tasks_done with choose-task rules
- current_tasks summary appears empty after refresh, so task selection may fall through to full gate validation
- next: confirm there are truly no active tasks, then run make check/test/lint if the active backlog is empty

- confirmed there are no active tasks and no current_task pointer
- started required gate run: make check and make lint already exited successfully; make test is still running
- next: wait for make test, then either create bug tasks for failures or touch .ralph/STOP if all gates are green

- make test is still running; Nix is building verify-service-test after runner-test finished building
- no active backlog exists, so gate results now fully determine whether we stop or open new bug tasks
- next: keep polling make test to completion and branch immediately on the result

- confirmed the active backlog is empty after refreshing Ralph summaries; `.ralph/current_task.txt` does not exist because there is no remaining selectable task
- verified the actual repo stack from the codebase: Nix flake entrypoints drive Rust workspace checks/tests plus the Go verify-service test module; `make check`, `make test`, and `make lint` all exited successfully
- next: none for task selection; set `.ralph/STOP` because there are no active tasks and the required gates are green

- verified `.ralph/STOP` exists after the successful gate run; the chooser reached the terminal no-backlog state
- no path was written to `.ralph/current_task.txt` because `.ralph/current_tasks.md` is empty and the Ralph rules require STOP instead of selecting a nonexistent task
- next: none; the repository currently has no active tasks and the loop should stop until new work is added
